case_title: CAMERON M. DUNN VS. DEPORTIVO ALVES FC USA,LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS ASSIGNEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUNN, CAMERON M. AS TO DEFENDANT DEPORTIVO ALVES FC USA,LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CALIFORNIA VICTORY SOCCER CLUB
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
